defs: Free to do or to grant; having the mind inclined; not opposed in mind; not choosing to refuse; disposed; not averse; desirous; consenting; complying; ready.
quotes: Felix, willing to show the Jews a pleasure, left Paul bound.
With wearied wings and willing feet.
[Fruit] shaken in August from the willing boughs.

defs: Received of choice, or without reluctance; submitted to voluntarily; chosen; desired.
quotes: [They] are held, with his melodious harmony, In willing chains and sweet captivity.
No spouts of blood run willing from a tree.
